hero.title: Selling has never been
hero.subtitle: Turn your passion into a business in 60 seconds. Get paid via WhatsApp, manage your inventory, and offer a luxurious experience to your customers.

features.title: More than a store, a gateway to your customers.
features.desc: Smpl is the SaaS platform designed for creators who prioritize human contact. No complex sales funnels, just an elegant link to your products and an order finalized where your customers already are: WhatsApp.
features.quote: The elegance of digital, the proximity of the real.

speed.title: Speed
speed.desc: Time is your most precious resource. Launch your catalog and start selling instantly.

heritage.title: Heritage
heritage.desc: Keep full control over your brand. Your customers, your data, your WhatsApp number.

aesthetic.title: Aesthetics
aesthetic.desc: Every pixel is designed to reflect the quality of your products. A storefront worthy of the finest brands.

newsletter.title: Join the direct sales movement.
newsletter.desc: Sign up to receive our advice on tomorrow's e-commerce and Smpl news.

login.title: Welcome
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your store and orders.

register.title: Create your Smpl store
register.subtitle: Launch your store in seconds and start selling everywhere.

Dashboard.subtitle: Summary of your store activities.
Dashboard.emptyDesc: Add your first products to start receiving sales on WhatsApp.

collection.title: 1. Data Collection
collection.content: We collect information you provide directly to us when you create an account, such as your store name, email address, and WhatsApp number.

usage.title: 2. Use of Information
usage.content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, and to communicate with you.

sharing.title: 3. Data Sharing
sharing.content: We do not share your personal data with third parties except as necessary to provide our services or as required by law.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using Smpl, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

use.title: 2. Use of Service
use.content: You are responsible for your use of the service and for any content you provide.

termination.title: 3. Termination
termination.content: We may terminate or suspend your access to the service at any time, without prior notice or liability.

dashboard.title: Global Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Monitor performance and health of your SaaS.

create.title: New User
create.subtitle: Add an administrator or a new partner to the platform.

boundary.description: We encountered an unexpected error. Our teams have been notified.
